# Can't Pay Your Bills? -- Options Before Bankruptcy [2026]
> Can't pay your bills? Explore debt negotiation, hardship programs, consolidation, and bankruptcy. Find the best option for you. 2026 guide. T pay my bills -- a clear-headed guide when debt feels overwhelming | cantpaymybills.

## About
cantpaymybills.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Bankruptcy Basics -- When Filing Makes Sense: https://cantpaymybills.com/bankruptcy-overview.html
- Debt Management Plans (DMPs) -- Nonprofit Help to Pay Down Debt: https://cantpaymybills.com/debt-management-plans.html
- Creditor Hardship Programs -- Reduced Payments and Interest: https://cantpaymybills.com/hardship-programs.html
- Can't Pay Your Bills? -- Options Before Bankruptcy: https://cantpaymybills.com/
- Medical Bill Options When You Cannot Pay: https://cantpaymybills.com/medical-bill-options.html
- Negotiating With Creditors -- How to Get Better Terms Without a Lawyer: https://cantpaymybills.com/negotiating-with-creditors.html
- Prioritizing Bills on a Limited Budget -- A Monthly Checklist: https://cantpaymybills.com/prioritizing-bills.html
- Emergency Rent Assistance Programs -- Help Paying Rent: https://cantpaymybills.com/rent-assistance.html
- How to Triage Your Debts -- Which Bills to Pay First: https://cantpaymybills.com/triage-your-debts.html
- Utility Shutoff Protections -- Keeping the Lights On: https://cantpaymybills.com/utility-shutoff-protections.html

- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
